title: Loka XP Bottles
description: This is a resource pack for the Loka Minecraft server, where there are 3 sizes of XP Bottles, this pack gives each one a unique texture.
body:
This is for use on the Loka Minecraft server. The server has three XP Bottle sizes and this pack gives each one their own texture with the use of CIT. Optifine / CIT Resewn

Original: (The latest response is proof that I am virfy)
https://forums.lokamc.com/threads/custom-loka-xp-bottles-16x.5976/#post-60824
